feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Hub
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Hub Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: While doing PGI in VL02N screen, i cant able to pick the quantity and post goods issue there.
entry.content:
Material DOVE 01 does not exist in warehouse ZD1

Message no. L9023

Diagnosis

All the materials that you use within a warehouse number must also be

defined for this warehouse number. The material you are using is not

defined.

Procedure

If you want to use the material within your warehouse number, you must

create the material in the material segment for that warehouse number.

entry.title: SAP counter should match with machine counter to get maintenance order on time.
entry.content:
Change machine hour counter in SAP PM Module.

Could you please help me resolve below issue.

Thank You!
Regards,

Barath

entry.title: Having Difficulty Creating Hyperlinks in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm working on implementing a hyperlink within SAP Build Process Automation, and I'm utilizing a custom script to generate this hyperlink with two input variables, 'url' and 'number,' while setting the output as 'number' to direct to the input URL. The script I'm using is as follows:

javascript

var link = '<a href=' + url + '>' + number + '</a>';

return link;

However, I'm encountering an issue with the output, which doesn't seem to resolve as a hyperlinked text properly:

`<a href='link'>123</a>`

I've also attempted to modify the function to handle escape characters, but unfortunately, that didn't resolve the issue:

javascript

return decodeURIComponent(link);

I'm seeking suggestions on how to successfully create a functional hyperlink, as I intend to pass it to my alert handler. Your insights and guidance would be greatly appreciated."

entry.title: Delivery has not yet been completely processed by WM and goods also not picked/unable to post PGI
entry.content:
hello,

I try to do OTC process. Am created order and delivery successfully after that i could not do post goods issue and picking also unable to done in LT03 scree.

the error messages i got were:

VL608 Delivery has not been completely processed by WM.

VL609 Delivery has not been putaway/picked completely

hope somebody can help solve this issue.

entry.title: I_JOURNALENTRYITEMBASIC_CDS is not available in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are working on integration between S/4HANA (On-Premises) and SAP Analytics Cloud.

Issue - We are looking for PRPS table (JIB Class/Sub Class fields) from S/4HANA in SAC instance. We are unable to find these fields directly in SAC (which is connected via standard integration), so we have tried the below steps.

Step-1: We have identified the API - I_JOURNALENTRYITEMBASIC_CDS which can bring the PRPS table (JIB Class/Sub Class fields)

Step-2: We have activated the below business components in SAC (1) SAP Finance (2) Finance foundation for S/4HANA and S/4HANA Cloud

Step-3: We are supposed to see the API - I_JOURNALENTRYITEMBASIC_CDS, but it is not available in the SAC even after activating the business content in SAC

Can you anyone please help us to understand how to activate the above API or a better way to extract PRPS table fields JIB Class and Sub Class information in SAP Analytics Cloud.

Current S/4HANA On-Prem version is 1908 and SAC version is 2023.16.12 (Client)

Regards

Lingesh

entry.title: Business Content Not Available in SAP Analytics Cloud for Project Data at WBS Element level
entry.content:
Hi All,

We need a help to identify any relevant stories delivered in the business content in SAC (content network) for Project System module of S/4HANA?

Current SAP data structure –

  1. Project is setup in PS module of SAP (Data for this level exists in the standard SAP table – PROJ)
  2. Each project has multiple child nodes which are called as WBS Elements (Data for this level exists in the standard SAP table – PRPS)
  3. Each WBS Element has financial postings (Data for this level exists in the standard SAP table – ACDOCA)
We understand there is only one report available for Project under below business content (story name - SAP__PPM_PROJECTPORTFOLIO)

Question - Anyone guide us if there are any relevant business content stories for WBS Element level?RegardsLingesh

entry.title: Memory Issue in SAP Analytics Cloud During Model Join
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are building a report in SAP Analytics Cloud for S/4HANA (on-prem) data using standard API query.

During the development, we are trying to connect two APIs - "A_JournalEntryItemBasic" with "A_FinWBSElements" to obtain the project information for financial postings.

During the join in the model, we are encountering a memory issue as shown below.

Issue: We are executing a left join condition on “Journal” table with (20 columns and 19,000 records) “WBS Element” table (15 columns and 116,670 records).

Error: “4 - Cannot allocate enough memory, please check traces for further information”

If anyone has already encountered this error, please help us. Feel free to recommend the possible option for us to explore and fix.

Thanks

entry.title: unable to get first name/last name in SAP analytics story report
entry.content:
So i made one story report replicating learning history report in lms

but in the report first name and last name are not getting fetched , could you please tell me how can we see those coloumns

entry.title: How do i change the cage code on a SAP Label?
entry.content: I am trying to figure out if theres a way to change the information on a SAP packaging label, for example if a label lists the cage code as 12345, is there a way to change the cage code on SAP to a different number?

entry.title: Change or Customize SAC Default Home Screen based on SAC teams?
entry.content:
Hi everyone

Is it possible to initially start SAC with my own HTML page (Like an intranet page) or highly customize the Home Screen (like in a story)?

if not, would it be possible that when a specific SAC Team starts SAC, a certian Diagrams/Numeric points will already be pinned to the Home screen according to my customization? (And other SAC Teams would see different pinned Diagrams)

I am aware of the Administration settings for the Default Appearance to change the Logo and add or remove tiles, but what I am searching for is either customizing the Home screen according to specific teams or adding my own Home Screen.

I appreciate any suggestions or ideas that could bring me to the solution.


Kind regards,
Feras

entry.title: Formula to replace actual version data to another version
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have a requirement where we have to override actuals version data with user selected version for GL account with in a classic story, please help us if we can write any formula at story level or dimension level (not as data action through script)?

From the above screenshot, we would like to override actual value (-17331) of test account with Budget value (Null).

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: what the steps i need to folow to write back by sac live connection
When single sign on to SAC, can I know the xml form of the samlresponse required to log in to SAC?
entry.content: When single sign on to SAC, can I know the xml form of the samlresponse required to log in to SAC?

entry.title: Canvas edit script options in analytical application and drop down edit options
entry.content:
I want to know what is Oninitialization  ...? Onorientation change...? on postmessage received ..? on resize .and on shake...which one is used in which case i didnt find any were when i search for it...plz help me with examples

in dropdown also we have onselect...?  onclick ..? on log press..?

entry.title: Sap Analytics / Not update Stories in Home screen
entry.content: I have placed some stories on my home screen as shortcuts and they dont update, but when I go to the initial position i see them normally

entry.title: SAP Analytics Hub - successor ?
entry.content:
Hello folks:

Is there any successor to the product SAP Analytics Hub?
This product seems outdated, or am I mistaken?

Thanks,
Andreas J.A.

entry.title: SAP SAC Planning Drop down / Input help Query
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I am developing a planning model and wanted to have input help / Dropdown in planning story .

Can we do this in Stories or we have to build this in SAC application ?

 

Thanks,

Zeba

entry.title: Partioning of table /BI0/F0SM_UPL_Y
entry.content:
which method is suitable for Partitioning  of table /BI0/F0SM_UPL_Y.  As we have house keep job has set and working fine. We kept 5 years retention as per the customer requirement and basic cleanup has been already.

current count is 1.5B. Could you please let me know which partitioning  is suitable for this log table and which key field i have to consider as we have many key fields in this table

entry.title: Update Member properties of SAC model via API
entry.content:
Dear Members ,

Our business requirement is to send details from SAC to SF , But we want to also update the member status of the data was send successfully to SF .

I am aware about the export API, Could you let me know if this is possible for we can update a member's details via an API from external middleware like SAP CPI?

entry.title: Unable to Find HXM workforce Planning Package in SAC
entry.content:
Dear SAC Team,

We are unable to find the Human Experience Management (HXM) Operational Workforce Planning content package for SAP Analytics Cloud in business Content.

Could someone guide if it is still available? or has ben replaced ?
